ContourFilterPen
reversedContour
ReverseContourPenc
Filter pen that passes outline data to another pen, but reversing
    the winding direction of all contours. Components are simply passed
    through unchanged.
    Closed contours are reversed in such a way that the first point remains
    the first point.
    c
self
contour
D/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/fontTools/pens/reverseContourPen.py
filterContour
ReverseContourPen.filterContourN)

rnd	}
 Generator that takes a list of pen's (operator, operands) tuples,
    and yields them with the winding direction reversed.
    Nr
